title: Marksman PET DOG WASTE EASY PICKUP POOPER SCOOPER WALKING POO POOP SCOOP GRABBER PICKER
features: Marksman Pet Dog Waste Easy Pickup Pooper Scooper Walking Poo Poop Scoop Grabber Picker
Marksman PET DOG WASTE EASY PICKUP POOPER SCOOPER WALKING POO POOP SCOOP GRABBER PICKER
description: This Pet Dirt Picker Is Lightweight, Portable And Works With Or Without A Poop Bag. Cleaning Up Clutter Has Never Been Easier. This Revolutionary Tool Is An Excellent Waste Disposal System, When You Need To Clean The Dog Mouth, Our Pet Dirt Picker Is An Easy To Use And Hygienic Option. The Longer Length Of 74Cm Prevents Bending Over And Is Ideal For Regular Use, Saving Time And Effort. No Bending Required To Pick Up Ideal If You Suffer From Back Or Hip Problems. Takes Small Or Large Amounts Of Waste Including Grass Cleanly And Hygienically Recommended Use With A Biodegradable Dog Bag. The Two Jaws Grab Waste With One Hand For Easy Disposal In A Bag While Never Letting Your Hands Go Near The Poop And Saving Your Back Too. You Can Also Load The Scoop With Several Clean Bags On Top Of Each Other There Can Always Be Another Bag Underneath If Your Four Legged Friend Needs The Toilet Again Tomorrow. No More Cleaning, Swinging Dog Bags In Your Hand, Or Nestling In Your Coat Pocket While Searching For A Dog Crate That Never Seems To Be Close Enough. Alternatively, It Can Also Be Used For Many Other Applications, Such As Cleaning Garden Ponds, Fruit, Etc.
